description_long: This is a tall, slender ceramic vase with a bulbous lower body that tapers gracefully into a long, narrow neck and a slightly flared rim. The surface is a pale, off-white color with hand-drawn brownish line art, featuring stylized fish and leaf motifs that wrap around the body. The artwork is simple yet elegant, with the fish depicted in a flowing, almost abstract style, and the leaves rendered with curving lines. The vase has a matte finish, giving it a subtle, understated appearance. There are no visible handles or additional structural embellishments, and the base is slightly wider for stability. The overall impression is of a decorative piece, likely intended for display in a refined urban or garden setting.
description: A tall, slender off-white ceramic vase with brown line art of fish and leaves, featuring a matte finish and elegant, simple motifs. The vase has a bulbous body, narrow neck, and flared rim.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fish motif prominently on the bulbous body, with the neck and rim clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side highlights the leaf motif, with less of the fish visible and the neck's vertical lines more apparent.
description_view_2: Another side view dominated by the leaf motif, with the fish motif mostly out of sight and the neck's design visible.
description_view_3: Back view reveals the tail of the fish motif wrapping around, with the leaf motif partially visible and the base in shadow.
attribute_pattern: stylized fish and leaf line art
